title: Open Road
lore: Kayan East imagined headlights on an empty highway where every sign points EAST — the filter sweep is the first curve past the neon district.
artistPersona: Nu-disco, house, and garage producer — every drop is 'a cultural moment,' and the compass only points east.
albumConcept: Kayan East's dancefloor gospel — Graduation pastels crashed into peak-hour house, every sign says EAST.
